name: Missed weeks of work from forklift leg fracture, how to claim lost pay?
description: Comp covers 66% lost wages; submit pay proof.

mainEntity.name: Missed weeks of work from forklift leg fracture, how to claim lost pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp covers 66% lost wages; submit pay proof.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp pays 66-75% wages from day 8; file Form 100 with proof.[5] Context: Temporary total disability standard. Key factors: Pay stubs verify. Practical guidance: Attorney speeds approval; tracks all losses. Includes training.
